zh.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Bennett是William Bennett和Mary Fryth的兒子，於1470年出生在英國諾福爾可盧沙拉爾。他於1490年與Elizabeth Gill在英國英格蘭爾索加爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1537年6月18日在英國英格蘭波克夏紐波利享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Bennett是William Bennett和Mary Fryth的儿子，于1470年出生在英国諾福爾可盧沙拉爾。他于1490年与Elizabeth Gill在英国英格兰爾索加爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1537年6月18日在英国英格兰波克夏紐波利享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特。

nameMeanings.name: Bennett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the medieval personal name Benedict , from Latin Benedictus ‘blessed’. In the 12th century the Latin form of the name is found in England alongside versions derived from the Old French form Beneit, Benoit, which was common among the Normans. The surname has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Bernhard  .
Altered form of French Benet or Bennet or of some other similar (like-sounding) French surname. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

variants.name: Bennetts
meanings: English (Cornwall): variant of Bennett , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Dittus
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Fritz, Kurt, Otto, Reinhold.
German: from a vernacular short form of the Latin personal name Benedictus (see Bennett ).

variants.name: Benedict
meanings: English, German, and Dutch: from the personal name Benedict, from Latin Benedictus ‘blessed’. This owed its popularity in the Middle Ages chiefly to Saint Benedict of Norcia (c. 480–550), who founded the Benedictine order of monks at Monte Cassino and wrote a monastic rule that formed a model for all subsequent rules. No doubt the meaning of the Latin word also contributed to its popularity as a personal name, especially in Romance countries. Occasionally the English surname may derive from Latin benedicite ‘bless (you)’, perhaps given as a nickname to an habitual user of the expression. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed the German variant Benedikt and many cognates from other languages, e.g. Hungarian Benedek , Slovenian Benedik (see Benedick ), and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Italian Benedetti .

variants.name: Bennight
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Bennett  .

variants.name: Bennison
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Bene(i)t + -son. See Bennett and compare Benson .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Bennett was born in 1470, in Rushall, Norfolk, England as the son of William Bennett and Mary Fryth. He married Elizabeth Gill in 1490, in Saughall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 18 June 1537, in Newbury, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Bennett est né en 1470, à Rushall, Norfolk, Angleterre, fils de William Bennett et Mary Fryth. Il a épousé Elizabeth Gill en 1490, à Saughall, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 18 juin 1537, à Newbury, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Gill nel 1490, nel Saughall, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Bennettは1470年にイギリスノーフォルクルシャルでWilliam BennettとMary Frythの息子として生まれた。1490年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアサウアルでElizabeth Gillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1537年6月18日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアニューブリーで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトにて埋葬された。

ko.Deptford, Surrey, England: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 데프트퍼드 스트 폴
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Bennett(은)는 1470년 영국 노르폴크 러샤에서 William Bennett(와)과 Mary Fryth의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 소그홀에서 Elizabeth Gill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1537년 6월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 뉴버이에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Bennett nasceu em 1470, em Rushall, Norfolk, Inglaterra filho de William Bennett e Mary Fryth. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Gill em 1490, em Saughall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de junho de 1537, em Newbury, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Bennett родился в 1470 г. в местности рушолл, норфолк, Англия. Его родителей звали William Bennett и Mary Fryth. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Gill в 1490 г. в местности соолл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 18 июня 1537 г. в местности нюбури, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
